title: selaginella glossophylla
intro: Selaginella glossophylla, also known as the glossy lip fern, is a species of evergreen fern belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The glossy lip fern has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Selaginella glossophylla can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are believed to offer benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting overall well-being.
